property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17.0.19 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;c:\Users\admin\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\admin\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Java\jre1.8.0_202 in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\apache-maven-3.9.16 in;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\admin\.local in;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\admin\Desktop\IJ\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.2.6 in;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\Azure Data Studio in;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE in;C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\Python in;c:\Users\admin\.vscode\extensions\ms-python.debugpy-2026.6.0-win32-x64 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;c:\Users\admin\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: testReadAndValidateAllCsvFiles
testcase.system-out:
================================================================================ TEST: Read and Validate All CSV Files in 'data/' folder ================================================================================
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\attendance.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,employeeId,yearMonth,workDays,overtimeHours Expected Column Count: 6 Analysis Completed for attendance.csv Total Data Records: 14405 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\departments.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,name,managerId Expected Column Count: 4 Analysis Completed for departments.csv Total Data Records: 10 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\employees.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,name,email,departmentId,employmentType,baseSalary Expected Column Count: 7 Analysis Completed for employees.csv Total Data Records: 1200 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\leave_balances.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: balanceId,employeeId,leaveType,totalLeaveDays,usedLeaveDays,remainingLeaveDays,version Expected Column Count: 7 Analysis Completed for leave_balances.csv Total Data Records: 2400 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\leave_requests.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: leaveId,employeeId,leaveType,startDate,endDate,reason,status,approvedBy Expected Column Count: 8 Analysis Completed for leave_requests.csv Total Data Records: 1454 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\payroll_entries.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,employeeId,netSalary,status Expected Column Count: 5 Analysis Completed for payroll_entries.csv Total Data Records: 14403 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\payroll_runs.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ Detected Header: id,version,yearMonth,mechanism,elapsedMs,successCount,doublePaymentCount,wrongLeaveCount,tps Expected Column Count: 9 Analysis Completed for payroll_runs.csv Total Data Records: 54 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\test_standalone.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ No Header detected. Expected Column Count inferred from first row: 3 Analysis Completed for test_standalone.csv Total Data Records: 5 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
------------------------------------------------------------ Analyzing File: data\user_accounts.csv ------------------------------------------------------------ No Header detected. Expected Column Count inferred from first row: 6 Analysis Completed for user_accounts.csv Total Data Records: 4 Total Missing/Invalid Values: 0
================================================================================ VALIDATION SUMMARY Total CSV files scanned: 9 Total errors across all files: 0 Total processing time: 198.728 ms (Limit: < 1000 ms) Result: PASSED ================================================================================

testcase.name: testCompareAndReportChanges
testcase.system-out:
================================================================================ COMPARE DATA CHANGES WITH BASELINE (data/ vs data_backup/) ================================================================================
[FILE MODIFIED]: attendance.csv Added Records (5): + ID: ATT_E0003_2026_06 (Line 14402): "ATT_E0003_2026_06,2,E0003,2026-06,1,0.0" + ID: ATT_E0012_2026_202605 (Line 14403): "ATT_E0012_2026_202605,2,E0012,2026-202605,0,4.0" + ID: ATT_E0014_2026_06 (Line 14404): "ATT_E0014_2026_06,2,E0014,2026-06,5,7.0" + ID: ATT_E0015_2026_06 (Line 14405): "ATT_E0015_2026_06,7,E0015,2026-06,5,5.0" + ID: ATT_E0007_2026_06 (Line 14406): "ATT_E0007_2026_06,10,E0007,2026-06,8,5.0"
[FILE MODIFIED]: payroll_entries.csv Added Records (3): + ID: PR_E0003_06_2026 (Line 14402): "PR_E0003_06_2026,1,E0003,76.92,PROCESSED" + ID: PR_E0014_06_2026 (Line 14403): "PR_E0014_06_2026,1,E0014,485.58,PROCESSED" + ID: PR_E0015_06_2026 (Line 14404): "PR_E0015_06_2026,1,E0015,456.73,PROCESSED"
[FILE MODIFIED]: payroll_runs.csv Added Records (6): + ID: RUN_2020-06_1782816510341 (Line 50): "RUN_2020-06_1782816510341,0,2020-06,DEFAULT,8800,0,0,0,0.00" + ID: RUN_06-2026_1782816848958 (Line 51): "RUN_06-2026_1782816848958,0,06-2026,DEFAULT,9018,0,0,0,0.00" + ID: RUN_2026-06_1782817394521 (Line 52): "RUN_2026-06_1782817394521,0,2026-06,DEFAULT,8747,3,0,0,0.34" + ID: RUN_0_1782817981290 (Line 53): "RUN_0_1782817981290,0,0,DEFAULT,8405,0,0,0,0.00" + ID: RUN_2029-202909_1782818016317 (Line 54): "RUN_2029-202909_1782818016317,0,2029-202909,DEFAULT,8203,0,0,0,0.00" + ID: RUN_2089-07_1782818034002 (Line 55): "RUN_2089-07_1782818034002,0,2089-07,DEFAULT,8049,0,0,0,0.00" Modified Records (48): - ID: RUN_NO_LOCK_01_2023 (at Line 2) * Field 'tps' changed: '0.0' -> '0.00' - ID: RUN_SYNCHRONIZED_01_2023 (at Line 3) * Field 'tps' changed: '0.0' -> '0.00' - ID: RUN_OPTIMISTIC_LOCKING_01_2023 (at Line 4) * Field 'tps' changed: '0.0' -> '0.00' - ID: RUN_FILE_LOCK_01_2023 (at Line 5) * Field 'tps' changed: '0.0' -> '0.00' - ID: RUN_NO_LOCK_02_2023 (at Line 6) * Field 'tps' changed: '0.0' -> '0.00' - ID: RUN_SYNCHRONIZED_02_2023 (at Line 7) * Field 'tps' changed: '0.0' -> '0.00' - ================================================================================ SUMMARY: 4 file(s) modified/added/deleted. Tip: To accept these changes, run the test with: -DacceptChanges=true Or simply delete the 'data_backup/' folder and run test again. ================================================================================
